old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-ahag","title":"Define cancellation-safe radio TX handoff","description":"Python LinkLayer retains a queued frame when Radio.transmit is cancelled, but SimRadio may already have sent TX_FRAME and be awaiting TX_DONE. Retrying can duplicate airtime and consume a stale simulator response. Define the Radio transmit cancellation/commit contract and make simulator and hardware adapters preserve protocol synchronization. Discovered reviewing convergence commit d422a03b; requires architecture beyond frozen conflict reconciliation.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-07-21T02:07:21.29259837Z","created_by":"ec2-user","updated_at":"2026-07-21T02:07:21.29259837Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-ahag","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-7fqg.2","type":"discovered-from","created_at":"2026-07-21T02:07:21.377637229Z","created_by":"ec2-user","metadata":"{}"}]}
